notes: Use one simple linear classifier family only; no model comparison or replacement candidate.
Use existing 7200-row Stage 1 formulaic OHLCV feature table only; no new formula generation or formula ranking.
Future training may join labels only from existing local reports/data; this protocol does not join labels.
Use monthly date_group chronological split; no random row split, no OOS rerun, and no candidate comparison.
No hyperparameter sweep, no threshold tuning, no model family comparison, no formula/model selection.
No production model artifact, no candidate_id, no broker or order output, no strategy parameter change.
